testcase.name: generateQuickAgentId > returns a string starting with quick_
generateQuickAgentId > has three underscore-separated parts
generateQuickAgentId > includes a numeric timestamp in the second segment
generateQuickAgentId > includes an 8-character hex/alphanumeric suffix
generateQuickAgentId > generates unique IDs across 200 rapid calls
eslint ignores configuration > excludes root-level generated directories
eslint ignores configuration > excludes agent worktree generated directories
